title: Claude Mythos explained..
summary: Caleb discusses Anthropic's Claude Mythos as a major frontier model breakthrough comparable to o1, highlighting a significant intelligence leap. He expresses concern about token disparity, where advanced model tokens are restricted to certain companies and use cases, limiting broader AI access as capability grows.
